comment.body: From one of Alma's posts late yesterday:  "however, if you want to short it now, or wait for more upside, you need to think about this line more like a zone.  so in example, that is as 6360/6400 area, okay? be ready for a fakeout, don't go all-in, but scale some OTM spreads to make it cheap.and you can cover the losses via intraday calls if market squeezes up.but if market leaves the area and builds a structure, you better leave, if you use options (due to theta)"
